rules.name: About Intro
rules.sourceRegex: Hi!\s+I['’]m\s+Ashish\s*,\s*UX designer and researcher from India with\s+\d+\s+years of experience in(?:\s+visual and)?\s+user-centric design\.
rules.targetRegex: Hi! I'm Ashish, UX designer and researcher from India with 5 years of experience in user-centric design\.

rules.name: Case Study 1 Title
rules.sourceRegex: Case Studies(?:\s+Case Studies)?\s+([^\.]{3,80}-\s+[A-Za-z]{3}\s+\d{2})\s+Enhancing web experience of an e-commerce distribution company

rules.name: Case Study 1 Description
rules.targetRegex: Enhancing web experience of an e-commerce distribution company

rules.name: Case Study 2 Title
rules.sourceRegex: Enhancing web experience of an e-commerce distribution company\s+([^\.]{3,80}-\s+[A-Za-z]{3}\s+\d{2})\s+A Figma plugin to help switch multiple fonts in three steps

rules.name: Case Study 2 Description
rules.targetRegex: A Figma plugin to help switch multiple fonts in three steps

rules.name: Case Study 3 Title
rules.sourceRegex: A Figma plugin to help switch multiple fonts in three steps\s+([^\.]{3,80}-\s+[A-Za-z]{3}\s+\d{2})\s+Optimizing digital services through CX and strategy

rules.name: Case Study 3 Description

rules.name: Case Study 4 Title
rules.sourceRegex: Optimizing digital services through CX and strategy\s+([^\.]{3,80}-\s+[A-Za-z]{3}\s+\d{2})\s+A Figma plugin to create button components set and documentation

rules.name: Case Study 4 Description

rules.name: Case Study 5 Title
rules.sourceRegex: A Figma plugin to create button components set and documentation\s+([^\.]{3,80}-\s+[A-Za-z]{3}\s+\d{2})\s+Mobile-friendly auto insurance registration website for Italy, Spain and France\.
